{"type":"text","timestamp":1774312900841,"sessionID":"ses_2e2b91eafffeuM00lDqIfrjzpD","part":{"id":"prt_d1d4a4371001qBp33mzwM5DJ2F","sessionID":"ses_2e2b91eafffeuM00lDqIfrjzpD","messageID":"msg_d1d49c6710015jyNnv1hHdp1Yw","type":"text","text":"Continuing as bee1828f, Founding Engineer. Focusing on the CEO inbox task AII-11 (high priority, in_progress).

Plan to advance
- A) Gather current AII-11 context
  - Read the latest AII-11 details from the CEO inbox to confirm the objective, blockers, and acceptance criteria.
- B) Create a concise AII-11 plan document
  - Title: AII-11 – MVP: Unified Data Backbone for AI Investment System
  - Goals: define a single data backbone to unify data sources, history, and governance across modules.
  - Scope (MVP): data models, a minimal common data interface, adapters for at least two sources, basic audit trail, and a plan for integration with existing modules.
  - Milestones:
    1) Requirements and data model draft
    2) Core interface design (contracts between modules)
    3) Adapter sketches for 2 data sources
    4) Simple MVP integration pathway and test plan
    5) Handoff plan to CEO/Founding Engineer
  - Deliverables: document link, a lightweight schema diagram, and a starter code scaffold (if applicable).
- C) Capture and store decisions
  - Create a memory note (AII-11#document-plan) describing the MVP scope, constraints, and next actions.
- D) Update task state
  - Mark AII-11 as in_progress with notes linking to the new plan document.
- E) Prepare for next step
  - After AII-11 plan is in place, outline a follow-up for AII-19 (priority medium) to ensure a smooth sequencing of tasks.

What I’m delivering next
- A clear AII-11 MVP plan document (human-readable) and a minimal memory note capturing decisions, scope, and next actions.
- A short, starter blueprint for a unified data backbone (data models + core interface + adapter plan) to guide subsequent code work.

If you want me to also start drafting the actual code skeleton or diagrams right away, say the word and I’ll lay out a minimal scaffold and a basic schema diagram for the MVP.","time":{"start":1774312900839,"end":1774312900839},"metadata":{"opencode":{"itemId":"msg_0161e6a9ed73b4440169c1ddc347148197b98f057b518288a0"}}}}
